negative_search_evidence.missing_behavior: The audited v2.2 port lacks calculate_audio_fees_phase2(duration_seconds) that charges executor-only audio completion fees and zero validator fees.
related_but_insufficient_code: constants.rs defines AUDIO_RESPONSE_DURATION_OFFSET but no audio Phase 2 pricing constants or function.
lib.rs calculate_async_fees_phase2 supports long-running HTTP, ZK, and persistent agent only; there is no audio Phase 2 branch.
payload and verifier helpers reject AUDIO_CALL_PRECOMPILE as unsupported two-phase fee parity.
ritual-revm-internal audio precompile code is not a settlement fee implementation in the audited port.

notes: No audited repo provides the audio duration-based Phase 2 fee calculation for the v2 port.
rationale: The restored Phase 2 function body explicitly encodes executor-only charging for audio completion work. No candidate in this bounded assignment contradicts or removes it.
statement: calculate_audio_fees_phase2(duration_seconds) must charge audio_phase2_execution_fee(duration_seconds) as executor_fee and zero commitment_fee and inclusion_fee because validator fees were already paid in Phase 1.
suggested_falsification_tests: Call calculate_audio_fees_phase2 for several durations and assert executor_fee equals audio_phase2_execution_fee(duration) while commitment_fee and inclusion_fee are U256::ZERO.
summary: Audio Phase 2 executor-only pricing is absent from the audited port.
test_or_falsification_candidate: Call calculate_audio_fees_phase2 for several durations and assert executor_fee equals audio_phase2_execution_fee(duration) while commitment_fee and inclusion_fee are U256::ZERO.
title: Audio Phase 2 pays executor only
